GIMME.title: Gimme!
GIMME.description: Put {Cards:diff()} random Colorless Attack cards from the [gold]draw pile[/gold] into your [gold]hand[/gold]. They cost {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} less this turn.
THRONEFALL.title: Thronefall
THRONEFALL.description: At the end of your turn, if you have [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] in your [gold]hand[/gold], deal {ThronefallDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
HANGING_EDGE.title: Hanging Edge
HANGING_EDGE.description: For each [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] in your [gold]hand[/gold], play it on an enemy and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it.
HEIRS_AGONY.title: Heir's Agony
HEIRS_AGONY.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
At the end of your turn, take {Damage:diff()} damage. Whenever you [gold]block[/gold] damage, [gold]Forge[/gold] that much.
